channel.title: Thomas Mason's Curation Feed
channel.description: This is my curation feed. This is where I re-publish content that I like. You should make one too.

item.title: HIDARI
item.description: A stop-motion samurai film done anime style that's in the works. It probably won't be out for a while, but it's darn cool!

item.title: Cool song: The Sorcerer
item.description: I liked this song. It's an instrumental.
